subject: FW: Hamptons
body:
-----Original Message-----
From: Farkas, Andrew L. [mailto:afarkas@islecap.com] 
Sent: Thursday, June 12, 2008 5:53 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Hamptons

Come to the hamptons this weekend and to my birthday party saturday night. Lots of your pals will be there including leon.
--------------------------------------------------------
